header:
Deed of the Woodwose
Tournoi du Faucon Noir 2026
description: Be it known to all unto whom these summons come that the Black Falcon School of Arms shall host at the Hauke Swordplay Summit its annual Deed of Arms, the Tournoi du Faucon Noir. All dedans shall be dressed as wildmen or wildwomen of the woods, and all dehors shall be dressed as the Arthurian knight Gawain.
theming_rules:
Rules: Theming

  • Dedans: Dressed as wildmen/wildwomen or bear a token marking them as on the 'woodsy' team (e.g., Oak Knight, Holly Knight).
  • Dehors: Dressed as Sir Gawain or show an opposing token (e.g., red pentangle, golden eagle on a red shield).
  • Style: Dedans shall have their own style under which to be announced (e.g., Squire of the White Pine).
engagement_rules:
Special Rules of Engagement

  • All normal rules of the Tournoi du Faucon Noir shall be observed.
  • Unless eating, sleeping, or teaching, no member of the dedans shall refuse a formal challenge issued by a dehors.
  • Each member of the dedans shall conceive a specific challenge for which they award a custom token (e.g., a sapphire).
  • In the Knights' Deed, the dedans must meet challenges armed de arma silvae (weapons of the woods like a thorny club, staff, or hide shield).
  • Dehors challengers in the Squire's Deed may request their opponent fight with a woodwose weapon of general equivalency.
  • At the end of the Deed, the defending dedans shall assemble and choose a 'First Among Equals' for both Squires and Knights.
